creator: n@nectar.com
text:
On Sun, Jul 02, 2000 at 12:56:25PM -0700, aron@cs.rice.edu wrote:
> Incidentally, the packages for gnome-1.2 at:
> 	ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/packages/gnome/
> are also incomplete. For example, there is no package for py-gnome-1.0.53
> which is needed. 

py-gnome had a packing list bug for the last full packages run, is all.
I believe it is unrelated to the problem you are reporting.
-- 
Jacques Vidrine / n@nectar.com / nectar@FreeBSD.org
